_comment: Integration mutation config — mutate routes/* using real Supabase via .env.test. Slow (35-60 min per file scope) so we run only on demand, not in CI. Scope intentionally narrow: 1 routes file at a time, paired with the spec(s) that cover it.
_coverageComment: off — Stryker's vitest runner perTest coverage breaks on integration tests with shared DB state; full re-run per mutant is the safe option.
_concurrencyComment: 1 because Supabase free-tier rate limits + shared test DB. Parallel mutants would step on each other's resetDb / seed calls.
_inPlaceComment: inPlace=true 让 Stryker 直接 mutate 源文件，避免 sandbox 里 ESM .js→.ts 解析 bug (跟 unit config 同套问题)。
